title: Freelook
description: This mod allows you to "move your head" without moving your player's heads rotation. Much like you can in lunar / badlion client, hold/press the keybind and look around while staying in whichever direction you are moving.
body:
This mod allows you to "move your head" without moving your player's heads rotation. Much like you can in lunar / badlion client, hold/press the keybind and look around while staying in whichever direction you are moving. The view will return when you let go of the key. 

Freelooking in 3rd person 


![3rd person freelook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2adfea517f7029757927b76c99d04fb90021baaa.gif)
